QF.id: VI Public Offering and Corporate Actions_31

question.text: In the tender offer process, are Clearing Members required to submit any separate instructions for early pay-in?

answer.text: No, CMs are not required to submit any instructions for executing early pay-in to the CC
Yes, CMs must submit physical DIS
Yes, CMs must submit electronic instructions
Yes, both physical and electronic instructions are required from CMs

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Clearing Members will not be required to submit any instructions — neither physical DIS nor electronic instructions — for executing Irreversible Delivery Out in favour of CC. **The Trap:** The old process required CM instructions, but the new process eliminated this requirement. **Cross-Exam Context:** Tender offer procedures are tested in NISM Series VI. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The streamlined process reduces operational burden on CMs and speeds up the tender offer settlement.
